title: BBS Photon Addon
description: Integration between BBS CML EDITION and Photon Editor.
body:
# BBS Photon Addon

Unlock new possibilities for your animations with the **BBS Photon Addon**! This extension for **BBS CML EDITION** introduces full compatibility for **Photon particles**, allowing animators to utilize them directly as a **Form**.

### ✨ Main Features

* **Photon Compatibility:** Seamlessly use Photon particles as forms within the mod.
* **Animator Freedom:** Designed specifically to give animators the tools they need to create stunning visual effects.

---

### 🛠️ How to Use

Using the addon is simple and integrated directly into your workflow:

1. Open the **Forms Category** in the menu.
2. Select the **Photon** Form.
3. Once inside the editor, look for the new button that allows you to **select your specific Photon particle**.

> **⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE:**
> The addon **only** reads files from the default **`FX` folder**. Please ensure all your particle files are saved in this directory; otherwise, the addon will not detect them.

---

### 🐛 Feedback & Support

While we have pushed the capabilities of this addon as far as possible, please be aware that **some limitations may apply**.

If you encounter any **bugs, crashes, or unexpected behavior**, please report them immediately in our **Discord Server**.
